arts.ttl: ‘Instead of Isak’: Jamie Carragher reckons Liverpool could end up signing £87m striker this summer
arts.sum: Liverpool may well be in for a new striker in the summer transfer window. Indeed, Darwin Nunez is expected to leave Liverpool this summer, and...

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's summer transfer plan one step ahead in the battle against PSR
arts.sum: Newcastle United know they can take a huge step towards Champions League football with a win against Crystal Palace this evening at St. James' Park. After excelling on loan with PSV last season, the Gambian looked the most likely to break into Howe's squad for the current campaign.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Crystal Palace – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle United will climb to third in the Premier League with a positive result against Crystal Palace this evening. The Magpies take on Palace at St James’ Park, bidding to take a step closer to Champions League football. In the absence of manager Eddie Howe, Newcastle thrashed Manchester United 4-1 at the weekend to record […] The post Newcastle vs Crystal Palace – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: 'I'm struggling' - Newcastle United Champions League verdict clear after Man United rout - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: The club host Crystal Palace on Wednesday (April 16) hoping to make it five straight league wins but will have to do so without manager Eddie Howe in the dugout as he is treated in hospital for pneumonia . Former Chelsea and Everton winger Pat Nevin has heaped praise on Newcastle as the Toon continue their bid to return to Champions League football next season.

arts.ttl: ‘The snake’ – Newcastle transfer sees claws out, ‘petrodollars’ and ‘mismanagement’ to blame
arts.sum: Malaga youngster Antoñito Cordero has been labelled ‘the snake’ for his move to Newcastle United, with implications he’s only made the move for the money. COPE, Diario Sur, En Cancha and Onda Cero all have their own takes on the transfer today, which has caused plenty of anger at Malaga and in Spain. arts.ttl: Newcastle United offered 28-goal star amid Steve Nickson's Morocco visit
arts.sum: Newcastle United's head of recruitment Steve Nickson is rubbing shoulders with talent spotters from top clubs in Europe this week at the Under-17 African Cup of Nations tournament in Morocco. Head Newcastle scout Steve Nickson is a regular visitor to Atalanta and needs no reminders of Retegui's capabilities.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Newcastle United star on radar ahead of summer window?
arts.sum: Arsenal are allegedly giving consideration to making an approach for one of Newcastle United's star players during the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Celtic and Rangers join race to sign Crystal Palace man who is high in demand
arts.sum: Crystal Palace players are high in demand ahead of the summer transfer window. Eberechi Eze could be on his way out of the club after Manchester United are showing serious interest in signing him this summer. arts.ttl: Juventus keen on offering Douglas Luiz in move for Newcastle United’s Sandro Tonali
arts.sum: Serie A giants Juventus are keen on signing Newcastle United’s Sandro Tonali and are willing to offer Douglas Luiz in a deal. Daniele Longo has reported today that Newcastle United…

arts.ttl: My team-mates were 'puking' during our nightmare flight to Newcastle
arts.sum: Carlton Cole has recalled the turbulent flight to Newcastle that left those around him 'puking' after their plane was thrown around like 'God's basketball' during a storm. Fast forward to the present day and Cole will be keeping a close eye on Newcastle United's game against Crystal Palace tonight as the Magpies look to go five points clear of Chelsea in the Champions League race.
